Title: Successful submission with valid details
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Contact Us page
2. Fill in all required fields with valid data
3. Click the Submit button
4. Observe and verify the result
Expected Result: Form is submitted successfully and a confirmation message is displayed to the user.

Title: Missing mandatory fields
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Contact Us page
2. Leave one or more mandatory fields empty
3. Click the Submit button
4. Observe and verify the result
Expected Result: Inline validation messages are displayed for each empty mandatory field.

Title: Invalid email format
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Contact Us page
2. Fill in all required fields with valid data
3. Click the Submit button
4. Observe and verify the result
Expected Result: An error message indicating an invalid email format is displayed.

Title: Invalid phone number
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Contact Us page
2. Enter an invalid phone number
3. Fill in all other required fields with valid data
4. Click the Submit button
5. Observe and verify the result
Expected Result: A phone number validation error message is displayed.

Title: Submission without reCAPTCHA
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Contact Us page
2. Fill in all required fields with valid data
3. Skip the reCAPTCHA step
4. Click the Submit button
5. Observe and verify the result
Expected Result: A validation message prompts the user to complete the reCAPTCHA before submitting.

Title: Dropdown and radio button validation
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Contact Us page
2. Select a value from the dropdown field(s)
3. Select a radio button option
4. Verify the selections are accepted without errors
5. Observe and verify the result
Expected Result: All dropdown selections and radio button choices are accepted without errors.

Title: System error during submission
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Contact Us page
2. Fill in all required fields with valid data
3. Simulate a system/server error condition
4. Click the Submit button
5. Observe and verify the result
Expected Result: A user-friendly error message is displayed with an option to retry.

Title: Usability and accessibility validation
Preconditions: User is on the Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Contact Us page
2. Navigate through all form fields using the keyboard (Tab key)
3. Verify all labels and ARIA attributes are present
4. Check colour contrast and focus indicators
5. Observe and verify the result
Expected Result: All form elements are accessible via keyboard, labels are correctly associated, and WCAG contrast ratios are met.
